title: Battlegrounds Mobile India Series/2021/The Grind
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021: The Grind}} {{BGMI Esports Navbox}} {{Tabs static |name1=Main Event|link1=Battlegrounds_Mobile_India_Series/2021 |name2=The Grind|link2=Battlegrounds_Mobile_India_Series/2021/The_Grind |this=2 }} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=2|liquipediatiertype=qualifier |name=Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021: The Grind |tickername=BGIS 2021: The Grind |shortname=BGIS 2021 |image=Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021 lightmode.png |imagedark=Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021 darkmode.png |type=Online |team_number=32 |icon=Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021 lightmode.png |icondarkmode=Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021 darkmode.png |series=Battlegrounds Mobile India Series|abbreviation=BGIS |organizer=KRAFTON |organizer-link=https://www.krafton.com/en/ |organizer2=Tesseract Esports |organizer2-link=https://www.tesseractesports.com/ |sponsor=[https://www.iqoo.com/ IQOO] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=2,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-12-02 |edate=2021-12-12 |twitter= |discord=p2U2ebfHJC |instagram=battlegroundsmobilein_official |web=https://esports-battlegroundsmobileindia.com/ |facebook=BattlegroundsMobileIN |youtube=channel/UCe31NPEeRGO0hcznx6Tdb-g |loco=streamers/BATTLEGROUNDS_MOBILE_INDIA }} '''''BGIS 2021: The Grind''''' is the official scrimmage session held for Invited teams before the start of '''''Battlegrounds Mobile India Series (BGIS) 2021'''''. '''''BGIS 2021: The Grind''''' features a prize pool of ₹2,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=2em}} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator|lang=in |b1=Mazy |b2=AnkiiiBOT |b3=Dinker Chaudhary |b3flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''BGIS 2021 The Grind:''' 2nd December 2021 to 12th December 2021'' Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] * '''''League Stage:''' 2nd December 2021 to 10th December 2021'' ** ''32 Invited teams will compete in the League Stage.'' ** ''Teams will be divided into 4 groups (8 teams per group) and will compete in a round-robin format'' ** ''24 matches to be played over a period of 6 days (12 per team).'' ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 16 teams}} from the overall standings will advance to the Final Stage.'' * '''''Final Stage:''' 11th December 2021 to 12th December 2021'' ** ''16 Teams will compete in the final stage''. ** ''10 matches to be played over a period of 2 days to determine the winner.'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=102px|Place !width=102px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-12}}||1 |- |{{Placement|13-16}}||0 |} ===Prize Pool=== ''₹2,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $2,665 {{Abbr/USD}} )'' are spread among the teams as seen below:
